title: Setting Sail.
content:
Exultation is the going
    Of an inland soul to sea, --
    Past the houses, past the headlands,
    Into deep eternity!

    Bred as we, among the mountains,
    Can the sailor understand
    The divine intoxication
    Of the first league out from land?
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Emily Elizabeth Dickinson delivers a powerful performance in "Setting Sail."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
